retrieved_result: How Can I Protect My Children from the Sun? Just a few serious sunburns can increase your child’s risk of skin cancer later in life. Kids don’t have to be at the pool, beach, or on vacation to get too much sun. Their skin needs protection from the sun’s harmful ultraviolet (UV) rays whenever they’re outdoors. Seek shade. UV rays are strongest
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses sun protection for children, which is unrelated to TikTok trends for 2024.
